name: Shree Renuka Sugars Limited
summary: Shree Renuka Sugars Limited manufactures and refines sugar in India and internationally. The company provides white/refined sugar, as well as by-products, including molasses, bagasse, press mud, and organic manure; and ethyl alcohol from molasses and fuel grade ethanol from sugarcane juice. It also produces power from bagasse, a sugarcane byproduct for state grids. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Belgaum, India. Shree Renuka Sugars Limited is a subsidiary of Wilmar Sugar Holdings Pte. Ltd.
